name: company-os
description: > The meta-framework for how a company runs -- the connective tissue between all C-suite roles. Covers operating system selection (EOS, Scaling Up, OKR-native, hybrid), accountability charts, scorecards, meeting pulse design, issue resolution (IDS), 90-day rocks, and communication cadence. Use when setting up company operations, selecting a management framework, designing meeting rhythms, building accountability systems, implementing OKRs, or when user mentions EOS, Scaling Up, operating system,
author: borghei
summary_zh: 一套帮公司搭建运营体系的元框架，涵盖管理模式选型（EOS、Scaling Up、OKR等）、权责图、计分卡、会议节奏和问题解决机制，适合创业团队或高管搭建公司运转骨架时使用。
